tasks.wasm:test: deno task wasm:build && deno test --allow-read js/mecojoni_test.ts js/workloads_test.ts
tasks.wasm:bench: cargo +1.85.0 build -p mecojoni-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && deno run --allow-read js/workloads_bench.ts
tasks.wasm:browser:test: deno task wasm:build && deno task wasm:browser:bundle && deno test --allow-read --allow-net=127.0.0.1 --allow-run --allow-env=MECO_BROWSER js/browser_test.ts
tasks.js:check: deno fmt --check deno.json js && deno check js/mecojoni.ts js/mecojoni_test.ts js/workloads.ts js/workloads_test.ts js/workloads_bench.ts js/browser_smoke.ts js/browser_test.ts js/browser_server.ts
